vBRIEFInfo.description: Scaffold generated by deft-directive-swarm Phase 0 from GitHub issue #577. Full acceptance criteria live in the referenced GitHub issue body.

plan.title: tasks/scope.yml quoted CLI_ARGS breaks all 7 scope lifecycle tasks on Windows (single-quote collision)

narratives.Overview: All seven `task scope:*` lifecycle commands (promote/activate/complete/cancel/restore/block/unblock) fail on Windows because `deft/tasks/scope.yml` wraps the CLI_ARGS interpolation in double quotes; go-task shell-escapes CLI_ARGS with single quotes on its own, producing `"'path'"` at dispatch and a literal single-quote-prefixed filename that Python tries to open. Fix: remove the double-quote wrapping around CLI_ARGS in all 7 tasks in scope.yml; add a guard-rail test (parametrized over all tasks/*.yml) asserting no command line contains double-quote-wrapped CLI_ARGS; extend the `windows-task-dispatch` CI job (#568) to exercise at least one scope:* command end-to-end on Windows. See GitHub issue #577 for full reproduction, root cause, and acceptance criteria.

references.title: Issue #577: tasks/scope.yml quoted CLI_ARGS breaks all 7 scope lifecycle tasks on Windows
